curation.synopsis: In the monolithic hive-city of Varangantua, Probator Symeon Noctis works the Nearsteel beat to atone for a noble past he refuses to claim. When a corpse is found bisected on the cobbles between Nearsteel and the Adeptus Mechanicus enclave of Steelmound, jurisdiction breaks down and the investigation drags Noctis past the cog-and-skull frontier. He is paired with Rho-1 Lux, a Collegiate Extremis tech-priest sent to look into her own kind, and the two outsiders pick their way through illegal servitor mills, smuggled augmetic parts and a quietly mechanised murder weapon. Guy Haley's procedural opens the seam between the city's Lex and the Mechanicus' own laws, and asks how much of a person you can replace before the law on either side stops caring whether they live.
